---
title: "gtars-sc vs Seurat: PBMC 3k Comparison"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    code_folding: show
params:
  data_dir: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(gtars)
has_seurat <- requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)
if (has_seurat) library(Seurat)
```

# Overview

This document runs the full single-cell RNA analysis pipeline on the
**PBMC 3k** dataset using both **gtars-sc** (Rust) and **Seurat** (R),
comparing timings, metric agreement, and output overlap at each step.

**Pipeline:** Read 10X → QC → Filter → HVG → Normalize → Scale → PCA →
FindNeighbors → FindClusters (Leiden) → UMAP → FindMarkers → Silhouette

```{r resolve-data}
data_dir <- params$data_dir

if (is.null(data_dir)) {
  # Try known local path (gtars-sc test data)
  candidate <- file.path(
    system.file(package = "gtars"),
    "..", "..", "src", "rust", "..", "..", "..",
    "gtars-sc", "tests", "data", "pbmc3k",
    "filtered_gene_bc_matrices", "hg19"
  )
  candidate <- normalizePath(candidate, mustWork = FALSE)
  if (!dir.exists(candidate)) {
    # Try the repo-relative path
    candidate <- normalizePath(
      "../../src/rust/../../../gtars-sc/tests/data/pbmc3k/filtered_gene_bc_matrices/hg19",
      mustWork = FALSE
    )
  }
  if (dir.exists(candidate)) {
    data_dir <- candidate
  } else {
    # Download from 10X
    data_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), "pbmc3k_10x")
    if (!dir.exists(data_dir)) {
      dir.create(data_dir, recursive = TRUE)
      url <- "https://cf.10xgenomics.com/samples/cell/pbmc3k/pbmc3k_filtered_gene_bc_matrices.tar.gz"
      tar_file <- file.path(tempdir(), "pbmc3k.tar.gz")
      cat("Downloading PBMC 3k dataset...\n")
      download.file(url, tar_file, quiet = TRUE)
      untar(tar_file, exdir = data_dir)
    }
    sub <- file.path(data_dir, "filtered_gene_bc_matrices", "hg19")
    if (dir.exists(sub)) data_dir <- sub
  }
}

cat("Data directory:", data_dir, "\n")
stopifnot(dir.exists(data_dir))
```

```{r timing-setup}
timings <- data.frame(
  step = character(),
  gtars_sec = numeric(),
  seurat_sec = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

time_it <- function(expr) {
  t <- system.time(expr)
  t[["elapsed"]]
}

fmt_time <- function(secs) {
  if (is.na(secs)) return("—")
  if (secs < 1) sprintf("%.0f ms", secs * 1000) else sprintf("%.2f s", secs)
}
```

`r if (!has_seurat) "**Note:** Seurat is not installed. Only gtars-sc results will be shown. Install Seurat for the full comparison."`

---

# Step 1: Read 10X

```{r read-10x}
t_gtars <- time_it({ fm <- sc_read_10x(data_dir) })
info <- sc_feature_matrix_info(fm)

if (has_seurat) {
  t_seurat <- time_it({
    seu_data <- Read10X(data.dir = data_dir)
    seu <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = seu_data, project = "pbmc3k")
  })
  cat(sprintf("Seurat: %d genes x %d cells\n", nrow(seu), ncol(seu)))
} else {
  t_seurat <- NA
}

cat(sprintf("gtars:  %d genes x %d cells (%s nnz)\n",
            info$n_features, info$n_cells, format(info$nnz, big.mark = ",")))
timings[nrow(timings) + 1, ] <- list("Read 10X", t_gtars, t_seurat)
```

---

# Step 2: QC Metrics

```{r qc-metrics}
t_gtars <- time_it({ qc <- sc_compute_rna_qc(fm) })

if (has_seurat) {
  t_seurat <- time_it({
    seu[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(seu, pattern = "^MT-")
  })
} else {
  t_seurat <- NA
}

timings[nrow(timings) + 1, ] <- list("QC metrics", t_gtars, t_seurat)
```

```{r qc-summary}
cat(sprintf("gtars  — median nFeatures: %.0f, median pct_mt: %.2f%%\n",
            median(qc$n_features), median(qc$pct_mt)))
if (has_seurat) {
  cat(sprintf("Seurat — median nFeatures: %.0f, median pct_mt: %.2f%%\n",
              median(seu$nFeature_RNA), median(seu$percent.mt)))
}
```

```{r qc-plots, fig.width=10, fig.height=4}
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))
hist(qc$n_features, breaks = 50, main = "nFeatures (gtars)", xlab = "Features per cell", col = "steelblue")
hist(qc$n_counts, breaks = 50, main = "nCounts (gtars)", xlab = "Total counts", col = "steelblue")
hist(qc$pct_mt, breaks = 50, main = "% MT (gtars)", xlab = "Mitochondrial %", col = "steelblue")
```

---

# Step 3: Filter Genes (min_cells = 3)

```{r filter-genes}
t_gtars <- time_it({ fm_fg <- sc_filter_genes(fm, min_cells = 3L) })
info_fg <- sc_feature_matrix_info(fm_fg)

if (has_seurat) {
  t_seurat <- time_it({
    seu <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = seu_data, project = "pbmc3k", min.cells = 3)
    seu[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(seu, pattern = "^MT-")
  })
  cat(sprintf("Seurat: %d genes\n", nrow(seu)))
} else {
  t_seurat <- NA
}

cat(sprintf("gtars:  %d -> %d genes\n", info$n_features, info_fg$n_features))
timings[nrow(timings) + 1, ] <- list("Filter genes", t_gtars, t_seurat)
```

---

# Step 4: Filter Cells (min_features = 200, max_pct_mt = 5%)

```{r filter-cells}
t_gtars <- time_it({
  fm_fc <- sc_filter_cells(fm_fg, min_features = 200L, max_pct_mt = 5.0)
})
info_fc <- sc_feature_matrix_info(fm_fc)

if (has_seurat) {
  t_seurat <- time_it({
    seu <- subset(seu, subset = nFeature_RNA > 200 & percent.mt < 5)
  })
  cat(sprintf("Seurat: %d cells\n", ncol(seu)))
} else {
  t_seurat <- NA
}

cat(sprintf("gtars:  %d -> %d cells\n", info_fg$n_cells, info_fc$n_cells))
timings[nrow(timings) + 1, ] <- list("Filter cells", t_gtars, t_seurat)
```

---

# Step 5: Find Variable Features (n = 2000, on counts)

HVG selection runs on **raw counts** before normalization, matching Seurat's VST behavior.

```{r hvg}
t_gtars <- time_it({ hvg_gtars <- sc_find_variable_features(fm_fc, n_features = 2000L) })

if (has_seurat) {
  t_seurat <- time_it({
    seu <- FindVariableFeatures(seu, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000)
  })
  hvg_seurat <- VariableFeatures(seu)
  overlap <- length(intersect(hvg_gtars, hvg_seurat))
  cat(sprintf("HVG overlap: %d / 2000 (%.1f%%)\n", overlap, overlap / 2000 * 100))
} else {
  t_seurat <- NA
}

cat(sprintf("gtars top 10 HVGs: %s\n", paste(head(hvg_gtars, 10), collapse = ", ")))
timings[nrow(timings) + 1, ] <- list("Find HVGs", t_gtars, t_seurat)
```

```{r hvg-venn, fig.width=6, fig.height=4, eval=has_seurat}
# Simple overlap visualization
n_gtars_only <- length(setdiff(hvg_gtars, hvg_seurat))
n_seurat_only <- length(setdiff(hvg_seurat, hvg_gtars))
n_shared <- length(intersect(hvg_gtars, hvg_seurat))

barplot(c("gtars only" = n_gtars_only, "Shared" = n_shared, "Seurat only" = n_seurat_only),
        col = c("steelblue", "mediumpurple", "coral"),
        main = "HVG Overlap (n=2000 each)",
        ylab = "Number of genes")
```

---

# Step 6: Log Normalize

```{r normalize}
t_gtars <- time_it({ fm_norm <- sc_log_normalize(fm_fc, scale_factor = 10000) })

if (has_seurat) {
  t_seurat <- time_it({
    seu <- NormalizeData(seu, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 10000)
  })
} else {
  t_seurat <- NA
}

timings[nrow(timings) + 1, ] <- list("Normalize", t_gtars, t_seurat)
```

---

# Step 7: Scale Data

```{r scale}
t_gtars <- time_it({ scaled_gtars <- sc_scale_data(fm_norm, hvg_gtars, clip_value = 10.0) })

if (has_seurat) {
  t_seurat <- time_it({
    seu <- ScaleData(seu, features = hvg_seurat)
  })
  cat(sprintf("Seurat scaled: %d x %d\n",
              nrow(GetAssayData(seu, layer = "scale.data")),
              ncol(GetAssayData(seu, layer = "scale.data"))))
} else {
  t_seurat <- NA
}

cat(sprintf("gtars  scaled: %d x %d\n", nrow(scaled_gtars), ncol(scaled_gtars)))
timings[nrow(timings) + 1, ] <- list("Scale", t_gtars, t_seurat)
```

---

# Step 8: PCA (50 PCs)

```{r pca}
t_gtars <- time_it({ pca_gtars <- sc_run_pca(scaled_gtars, n_pcs = 50L) })

if (has_seurat) {
  t_seurat <- time_it({
    seu <- RunPCA(seu, features = hvg_seurat, npcs = 50, verbose = FALSE)
  })
} else {
  t_seurat <- NA
}

cat(sprintf("gtars embeddings: %d cells x %d PCs\n",
            nrow(pca_gtars$embeddings), ncol(pca_gtars$embeddings)))
timings[nrow(timings) + 1, ] <- list("PCA", t_gtars, t_seurat)
```

## Variance Explained

```{r variance-explained, fig.width=8, fig.height=4}
ve_gtars <- pca_gtars$variance_explained

if (has_seurat) {
  seu_sdev <- Stdev(seu, reduction = "pca")
  ve_seurat <- seu_sdev^2 / sum(seu_sdev^2)

  plot(seq_along(ve_gtars), ve_gtars * 100, type = "b", pch = 16, col = "steelblue",
       xlab = "PC", ylab = "% Variance Explained", main = "Variance Explained per PC",
       ylim = range(c(ve_gtars, ve_seurat) * 100))
  lines(seq_along(ve_seurat), ve_seurat * 100, type = "b", pch = 17, col = "coral")
  legend("topright", c("gtars-sc", "Seurat"), col = c("steelblue", "coral"),
         pch = c(16, 17), lty = 1)
} else {
  plot(seq_along(ve_gtars), ve_gtars * 100, type = "b", pch = 16, col = "steelblue",
       xlab = "PC", ylab = "% Variance Explained", main = "Variance Explained per PC (gtars-sc)")
}
```

```{r embedding-correlation, eval=has_seurat}
shared_cells <- intersect(rownames(pca_gtars$embeddings), colnames(seu))
if (length(shared_cells) > 0) {
  gtars_emb <- pca_gtars$embeddings[shared_cells, , drop = FALSE]
  seurat_emb <- Embeddings(seu, "pca")[shared_cells, , drop = FALSE]
  n_compare <- min(ncol(gtars_emb), ncol(seurat_emb))
  cors <- sapply(seq_len(n_compare), function(i) abs(cor(gtars_emb[, i], seurat_emb[, i])))

  cat(sprintf("Shared cells: %d\n", length(shared_cells)))
  cat(sprintf("Mean |cor| across %d PCs: %.4f\n", n_compare, mean(cors)))
  cat(sprintf("PC1 |cor|: %.4f, PC2 |cor|: %.4f, PC3 |cor|: %.4f\n", cors[1], cors[2], cors[3]))
}
```

```{r embedding-cor-plot, fig.width=8, fig.height=4, eval=has_seurat}
if (exists("cors")) {
  barplot(cors, names.arg = paste0("PC", seq_along(cors)),
          col = ifelse(cors > 0.9, "steelblue", ifelse(cors > 0.7, "orange", "coral")),
          main = "Embedding Correlation (|r|) per PC",
          ylab = "|Pearson r|", las = 2, cex.names = 0.7)
  abline(h = 0.9, lty = 2, col = "grey50")
}
```

---

# Step 9: Find Neighbors (KNN + SNN)

```{r find-neighbors}
t_gtars <- time_it({
  snn_ptr <- sc_find_neighbors(pca_gtars$embeddings, k = 20L, prune_snn = 1/15)
})

if (has_seurat) {
  t_seurat <- time_it({
    seu <- FindNeighbors(seu, dims = 1:50, k.param = 20, prune.SNN = 1/15, verbose = FALSE)
  })
} else {
  t_seurat <- NA
}

timings[nrow(timings) + 1, ] <- list("FindNeighbors", t_gtars, t_seurat)
```

---

# Step 10: Find Clusters (Leiden)

```{r find-clusters}
t_gtars <- time_it({
  clust_gtars <- sc_find_clusters(snn_ptr, resolution = 0.8, max_iter = 10L)
})

cat(sprintf("gtars:  %d clusters, modularity = %.4f\n",
            clust_gtars$n_clusters, clust_gtars$quality))

if (has_seurat) {
  t_seurat <- time_it({
    seu <- FindClusters(seu, resolution = 0.8, algorithm = 1, verbose = FALSE)
  })
  seurat_clusters <- as.integer(Idents(seu)) - 1L  # Convert to 0-indexed
  n_seurat_clusters <- length(unique(seurat_clusters))
  cat(sprintf("Seurat: %d clusters\n", n_seurat_clusters))
} else {
  t_seurat <- NA
}

timings[nrow(timings) + 1, ] <- list("FindClusters", t_gtars, t_seurat)
```

```{r cluster-comparison, eval=has_seurat}
# Adjusted Rand Index to compare cluster agreement
if (requireNamespace("mclust", quietly = TRUE)) {
  shared_cells_clust <- intersect(rownames(pca_gtars$embeddings), colnames(seu))
  gtars_labels <- clust_gtars$assignments[match(shared_cells_clust, rownames(pca_gtars$embeddings))]
  seurat_labels <- as.integer(Idents(seu)[shared_cells_clust]) - 1L
  ari <- mclust::adjustedRandIndex(gtars_labels, seurat_labels)
  cat(sprintf("Adjusted Rand Index (gtars vs Seurat): %.4f\n", ari))
  cat("(1.0 = identical, 0.0 = random agreement)\n")
} else {
  cat("Install `mclust` package for Adjusted Rand Index comparison\n")
}
```

```{r cluster-counts, fig.width=8, fig.height=4, eval=has_seurat}
shared_cells_clust <- intersect(rownames(pca_gtars$embeddings), colnames(seu))
gtars_labels <- clust_gtars$assignments[match(shared_cells_clust, rownames(pca_gtars$embeddings))]
seurat_labels <- as.integer(Idents(seu)[shared_cells_clust]) - 1L

par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
barplot(table(gtars_labels), col = "steelblue", main = "gtars-sc Cluster Sizes",
        xlab = "Cluster", ylab = "Cells")
barplot(table(seurat_labels), col = "coral", main = "Seurat Cluster Sizes",
        xlab = "Cluster", ylab = "Cells")
```

---

# Step 11: UMAP Visualization

UMAP is computed in R (using `uwot`) for both pipelines. gtars-sc deliberately
defers UMAP to the host language since R/Python/JS users prefer their own
implementations.

```{r umap-setup}
has_uwot <- requireNamespace("uwot", quietly = TRUE)
if (!has_uwot) {
  cat("Install `uwot` package for UMAP visualization: install.packages('uwot')\n")
}
```

```{r umap-gtars, eval=has_uwot}
t_umap_gtars <- time_it({
  umap_gtars <- uwot::umap(pca_gtars$embeddings, n_neighbors = 30, min_dist = 0.3,
                            metric = "cosine", n_threads = 1, ret_nn = FALSE)
})
rownames(umap_gtars) <- rownames(pca_gtars$embeddings)
cat(sprintf("gtars UMAP: %.2f s\n", t_umap_gtars))
```

```{r umap-seurat, eval=has_seurat}
t_seurat_umap <- time_it({
  seu <- RunUMAP(seu, dims = 1:50, verbose = FALSE)
})
timings[nrow(timings) + 1, ] <- list("UMAP", t_umap_gtars, t_seurat_umap)
```

```{r umap-timing-no-seurat, eval=!has_seurat && has_uwot}
timings[nrow(timings) + 1, ] <- list("UMAP", t_umap_gtars, NA)
```

```{r umap-plot, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, eval=has_uwot}
# Color palette for clusters
n_colors <- max(clust_gtars$n_clusters, if (has_seurat) n_seurat_clusters else 0)
pal <- if (n_colors <= 20) {
  rainbow(n_colors, s = 0.7, v = 0.85)
} else {
  hcl.colors(n_colors, "Dark 3")
}

if (has_seurat) {
  par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))

  # gtars UMAP + clusters
  plot(umap_gtars[, 1], umap_gtars[, 2],
       col = pal[clust_gtars$assignments + 1], pch = 16, cex = 0.4,
       xlab = "UMAP 1", ylab = "UMAP 2",
       main = sprintf("gtars-sc (%d clusters)", clust_gtars$n_clusters))

  # Seurat UMAP + clusters
  seurat_umap <- Embeddings(seu, "umap")
  seurat_clust <- as.integer(Idents(seu)) - 1L
  plot(seurat_umap[, 1], seurat_umap[, 2],
       col = pal[seurat_clust + 1], pch = 16, cex = 0.4,
       xlab = "UMAP 1", ylab = "UMAP 2",
       main = sprintf("Seurat (%d clusters)", n_seurat_clusters))
} else {
  plot(umap_gtars[, 1], umap_gtars[, 2],
       col = pal[clust_gtars$assignments + 1], pch = 16, cex = 0.4,
       xlab = "UMAP 1", ylab = "UMAP 2",
       main = sprintf("gtars-sc (%d clusters)", clust_gtars$n_clusters))
}
```

```{r umap-cross-color, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, eval=has_seurat && has_uwot}
# Show gtars UMAP colored by Seurat clusters and vice versa for visual alignment
shared <- intersect(rownames(umap_gtars), colnames(seu))
par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))

# gtars UMAP colored by Seurat clusters
seurat_cl_for_gtars <- as.integer(Idents(seu)[shared]) - 1L
plot(umap_gtars[shared, 1], umap_gtars[shared, 2],
     col = pal[seurat_cl_for_gtars + 1], pch = 16, cex = 0.4,
     xlab = "UMAP 1", ylab = "UMAP 2",
     main = "gtars UMAP, Seurat clusters")

# Seurat UMAP colored by gtars clusters
gtars_cl_for_seurat <- clust_gtars$assignments[match(shared, rownames(pca_gtars$embeddings))]
seurat_umap_shared <- Embeddings(seu, "umap")[shared, ]
plot(seurat_umap_shared[, 1], seurat_umap_shared[, 2],
     col = pal[gtars_cl_for_seurat + 1], pch = 16, cex = 0.4,
     xlab = "UMAP 1", ylab = "UMAP 2",
     main = "Seurat UMAP, gtars clusters")
```

---

# Step 12: Find Markers

```{r find-markers}
t_gtars <- time_it({
  markers_gtars <- sc_find_all_markers(fm_norm, clust_gtars$assignments,
                                        min_pct = 0.25, min_log2fc = 0.25)
})
cat(sprintf("gtars:  %d markers found\n", nrow(markers_gtars)))

if (has_seurat) {
  t_seurat <- time_it({
    markers_seurat <- FindAllMarkers(seu, only.pos = TRUE, min.pct = 0.25,
                                      logfc.threshold = 0.25, verbose = FALSE)
  })
  cat(sprintf("Seurat: %d markers found\n", nrow(markers_seurat)))
} else {
  t_seurat <- NA
}

timings[nrow(timings) + 1, ] <- list("FindMarkers", t_gtars, t_seurat)
```

```{r top-markers}
# Show top 5 markers per cluster (gtars)
for (cl in sort(unique(markers_gtars$cluster))) {
  cl_markers <- markers_gtars[markers_gtars$cluster == cl, ]
  cl_markers <- cl_markers[order(cl_markers$pval_adj), ]
  top <- head(cl_markers, 5)
  cat(sprintf("Cluster %d: %s\n", cl, paste(top$gene, collapse = ", ")))
}
```

```{r marker-overlap, eval=has_seurat}
# Compare top markers per cluster (each pipeline's own clusters)
cat("\n--- Marker overlap (top 20 per cluster, own clusters) ---\n")
gtars_clusters <- sort(unique(markers_gtars$cluster))
for (cl in gtars_clusters) {
  g_top <- head(markers_gtars$gene[markers_gtars$cluster == cl][
    order(markers_gtars$pval_adj[markers_gtars$cluster == cl])], 20)

  # Find closest Seurat cluster by marker overlap
  seurat_cl_ids <- sort(unique(markers_seurat$cluster))
  best_overlap <- 0
  best_seurat_cl <- NA
  for (s_cl in seurat_cl_ids) {
    s_top <- head(markers_seurat$gene[markers_seurat$cluster == s_cl][
      order(markers_seurat$p_val_adj[markers_seurat$cluster == s_cl])], 20)
    ov <- length(intersect(g_top, s_top))
    if (ov > best_overlap) {
      best_overlap <- ov
      best_seurat_cl <- s_cl
    }
  }
  cat(sprintf("  gtars %d -> Seurat %s: %d/20 top markers shared\n",
              cl, best_seurat_cl, best_overlap))
}
```

## Same-Cluster Marker Comparison

To separate clustering differences from marker detection differences, we run
**gtars marker detection on Seurat's clusters** and compare the resulting gene
lists directly.

```{r same-cluster-markers, eval=has_seurat}
# Run gtars FindMarkers using Seurat's cluster assignments
shared_cells_mk <- intersect(rownames(pca_gtars$embeddings), colnames(seu))
seurat_labels_for_gtars <- as.integer(Idents(seu)[shared_cells_mk]) - 1L

t_gtars_seurat_cl <- time_it({
  markers_gtars_scl <- sc_find_all_markers(fm_norm, seurat_labels_for_gtars,
                                            min_pct = 0.25, min_log2fc = 0.25)
})

cat(sprintf("gtars markers (Seurat clusters): %d found in %.2f s\n",
            nrow(markers_gtars_scl), t_gtars_seurat_cl))

cat("\n--- Same-cluster marker overlap (top 20 per cluster) ---\n")
for (s_cl in sort(unique(markers_seurat$cluster))) {
  s_cl_int <- as.integer(s_cl) - 1L
  g_top <- head(markers_gtars_scl$gene[markers_gtars_scl$cluster == s_cl_int][
    order(markers_gtars_scl$pval_adj[markers_gtars_scl$cluster == s_cl_int])], 20)
  s_top <- head(markers_seurat$gene[markers_seurat$cluster == s_cl][
    order(markers_seurat$p_val_adj[markers_seurat$cluster == s_cl])], 20)
  ov <- length(intersect(g_top, s_top))
  cat(sprintf("  Cluster %s: %d/20 top markers shared (gtars Wilcoxon vs Seurat)\n", s_cl, ov))
}
```

```{r known-markers, fig.width=10, fig.height=5, eval=has_uwot}
# Highlight known cell type markers on the UMAP
known <- c("CD3D", "CD3E",     # T cells
           "MS4A1", "CD79A",   # B cells
           "LYZ", "S100A8",    # Monocytes
           "NKG7", "GNLY")     # NK cells

found <- known[known %in% markers_gtars$gene]
cat(sprintf("Known PBMC markers in gtars results: %d/%d\n", length(found), length(known)))
if (length(found) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("  Found: %s\n", paste(found, collapse = ", ")))
  missing <- setdiff(known, found)
  if (length(missing) > 0) cat(sprintf("  Missing: %s\n", paste(missing, collapse = ", ")))
}
```

---

# Step 13: Silhouette Scores

```{r silhouette}
t_gtars <- time_it({
  sil_gtars <- sc_silhouette(pca_gtars$embeddings, clust_gtars$assignments)
})
cat(sprintf("gtars mean silhouette: %.4f\n", sil_gtars$avg))

timings[nrow(timings) + 1, ] <- list("Silhouette", t_gtars, NA)
```

```{r silhouette-plot, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
# Per-cluster silhouette
scores_by_cluster <- split(sil_gtars$scores, clust_gtars$assignments)
cluster_means <- sapply(scores_by_cluster, mean)

barplot(sort(cluster_means, decreasing = TRUE),
        col = pal[as.integer(names(sort(cluster_means, decreasing = TRUE))) + 1],
        main = sprintf("Mean Silhouette by Cluster (overall: %.3f)", sil_gtars$avg),
        ylab = "Mean Silhouette Score", xlab = "Cluster",
        names.arg = names(sort(cluster_means, decreasing = TRUE)))
abline(h = sil_gtars$avg, lty = 2, col = "grey40")
```

---

# Timing Summary

```{r timing-table}
timings$speedup <- ifelse(
  is.na(timings$seurat_sec) | timings$gtars_sec < 0.001,
  NA,
  timings$seurat_sec / pmax(timings$gtars_sec, 0.001)
)
timings$gtars_fmt <- sapply(timings$gtars_sec, fmt_time)
timings$seurat_fmt <- ifelse(is.na(timings$seurat_sec), "—", sapply(timings$seurat_sec, fmt_time))
timings$speedup_fmt <- ifelse(is.na(timings$speedup), "—", sprintf("%.1fx", timings$speedup))

knitr::kable(
  timings[, c("step", "gtars_fmt", "seurat_fmt", "speedup_fmt")],
  col.names = c("Step", "gtars-sc", "Seurat", "Speedup"),
  align = c("l", "r", "r", "r"),
  caption = "Step-by-step timing comparison"
)
```

```{r timing-totals}
total_gtars <- sum(timings$gtars_sec)
total_seurat <- sum(timings$seurat_sec, na.rm = TRUE)
cat(sprintf("Total gtars-sc: %s\n", fmt_time(total_gtars)))
if (!all(is.na(timings$seurat_sec))) {
  cat(sprintf("Total Seurat:   %s\n", fmt_time(total_seurat)))
  cat(sprintf("Overall speedup: %.1fx\n", total_seurat / max(total_gtars, 0.001)))
}
```

```{r timing-barplot, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
if (!all(is.na(timings$seurat_sec))) {
  mat <- rbind(gtars = timings$gtars_sec, Seurat = timings$seurat_sec)
  colnames(mat) <- timings$step
  barplot(mat, beside = TRUE, col = c("steelblue", "coral"),
          main = "Timing Comparison by Step", ylab = "Seconds", las = 2,
          cex.names = 0.8)
  legend("topright", c("gtars-sc", "Seurat"), fill = c("steelblue", "coral"))
} else {
  barplot(timings$gtars_sec, names.arg = timings$step,
          col = "steelblue", main = "gtars-sc Timing by Step",
          ylab = "Seconds", las = 2, cex.names = 0.8)
}
```

---

# Session Info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
